description: Production-ready automation platform for FBA product sourcing from supplier websites to Amazon marketplace with file-grounded state management and resumable processing workflows

entry_points.name: Main PoundWholesale Runner
entry_points.description: Primary launcher for PoundWholesale supplier automation

entry_points.name: Clearance King Runner
entry_points.description: Alternative launcher for ClearanceKing supplier automation

core_workflow_components.name: PassiveExtractionWorkflow
core_workflow_components.description: Main orchestrator class for the entire product sourcing workflow

key_methods.name: run
key_methods.description: Main execution entry point with configuration loading

core_workflow_components.name: FixedAmazonExtractor
core_workflow_components.description: Specialized Amazon.co.uk interaction with Chrome extension support

key_methods.name: search_by_ean_and_extract_data
key_methods.description: Primary high-confidence EAN search with ad filtering

key_methods.name: extract_data
key_methods.description: ASIN data extraction with browser page reuse

critical_utilities.name: EnhancedStateManager
critical_utilities.description: File-grounded state management with freeze-mark-resume sequence

critical_methods.name: load_state
critical_methods.description: Load state from persistent files with validation

critical_utilities.name: BrowserManager
critical_utilities.description: Chrome CDP connection management with IPv6/IPv4 dual-stack support

critical_utilities.name: WindowsSaveGuardian
critical_utilities.description: Atomic file operations for Windows compatibility

configuration_system.name: System Configuration
configuration_system.description: Master operational settings and processing limits

configuration_system.name: PoundWholesale Categories
configuration_system.description: Predefined category URLs for PoundWholesale supplier

configuration_system.name: ClearanceKing Categories
configuration_system.description: Predefined category URLs for ClearanceKing supplier

output_structure.description: State management files for resumable processing
EAN→ASIN mapping files organized by supplier
Detailed execution logs with forensic timestamps

workflow_phases.description: Chrome CDP connection, authentication verification, configuration loading
URL discovery → manifest generation → denominator freezing → product processing
Deterministic selector-based scraping with O(1) duplicate prevention
EAN-first matching with title fallback and similarity scoring
UK marketplace calculations with 20% VAT, 15% FBA fees

test_infrastructure.description: Comprehensive test suite with unit, integration, and E2E tests

technical_debt.description: Archived directories and duplicate versions consuming space
technical_debt.recommendation: Clean up backup/ and archive/ directories after validation

technical_debt.description: Multiple versions of core tools with -*good.py, -Copy.py suffixes

key_architectural_patterns.description: All state calculations based on actual files, not memory variables
key_architectural_patterns.benefit: Enables true resumable processing across sessions

key_architectural_patterns.description: Denominator frozen on first encounter, state committed atomically
Automatic endpoint detection with connection fallback
